story_summary: A narrator reflects on family as the bedrock of life, describing children, spouses, grandchildren, and how love and regular contact have sustained close relationships despite geographic distance.

context.stakes: emotional cohesion, family wellbeing and legacy

core_conflict: Maintaining close family bonds and support across geographic distance and life changes.

principles.principle: Sustain emotional closeness despite physical distance.
principles.evidence: distance has not seemed to us to be a stumbling block for our love and affection for one another.

principles.principle: Trust and rely on capable partners to manage family responsibilities during absences.
principles.evidence: she took charge of their affairs and managed their family when Paul was deployed on several extended tours in the Middle East.

principles.principle: Expose children to varied environments to build adaptability, independence and confidence.
principles.evidence: We believe that both Miranda and Jordan have actually benefitted from moving every three or four years.

principles.principle: Use periodic family gatherings and celebrations to reinforce connections.
principles.evidence: Occasionally, we are able to assemble everyone at the same time for a family gathering.

principles.principle: Leverage modern communication technology to maintain regular contact.
principles.evidence: we manage to stay in regular close touch through the beauty of modern communications technology.

principles.principle: Express gratitude and regard family as a precious gift.
principles.evidence: I truly regard my family as an extraordinary gift.

decision_heuristics.heuristic: When family members live apart, maintain frequent contact using modern communications to preserve closeness.
decision_heuristics.evidence: we manage to stay in regular close touch through the beauty of modern communications technology.

decision_heuristics.heuristic: When raising children, introduce relocations and new environments periodically to build adaptability and independence.
decision_heuristics.evidence: We believe that both Miranda and Jordan have actually benefitted from moving every three or four years.

decision_heuristics.heuristic: When a partner is deployed or absent, empower the other partner to take charge of family affairs and trust their management.
decision_heuristics.evidence: she took charge of their affairs and managed their family when Paul was deployed on several extended tours in the Middle East.

decision_heuristics.heuristic: Organize occasional full-family gatherings or milestone celebrations to strengthen bonds and create shared memories.
decision_heuristics.evidence: Occasionally, we are able to assemble everyone at the same time for a family gathering.

leadership_patterns.risk_tolerance: conservative; prioritizes family stability and continuity
leadership_patterns.communication_style: warm, regular, and reliant on modern technology to sustain ties
leadership_patterns.accountability_posture: delegative and appreciative—assigns responsibility to capable partners and credits them publicly
leadership_patterns.ethical_framing: family-centered moral framing emphasizing gratitude, stewardship, and reciprocal gift

quotes.quote: An ounce of blood is worth more than a pound of friendship.
distance has not seemed to us to be a stumbling block for our love and affection for one another.
We believe that both Miranda and Jordan have actually benefitted from moving every three or four years.
we manage to stay in regular close touch through the beauty of modern communications technology.
I truly regard my family as an extraordinary gift.
